title: trifolium wormskioldii var. wormskioldii
intro: Trifolium wormskioldii var. wormskioldii, also known as Wormskjold's clover or Wormskjold's lupine, is a variety of the Trifolium wormskioldii plant, a species of flowering plant in the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Trifolium wormskioldii var. wormskioldii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against infection, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves and flowers in water or oil, and can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
